reviews.review_msg: Very nice prof. He is extremely good at teaching Calculus, however his midterm and finals are tough. You really have to study a lot for them. Free 15% on quizzes and assignments, 5% for calculus readiness test 30% for 2 midterms, and 50% for final.
great proffesor, exams are brutal, but you really do learn calculas with him!
Great Professor. The notes he gave out were crystal clear. Always available for extra help and also willing to help out students. Overall, he is one of the best professors at SFU
